name: cross-agent-review
description: Workflow for routine cross-vendor AI agent peer review — Claude reviews Codex's work, Codex reviews Claude's, etc. Defines the handoff package (what to include, what to redact), the cold-review discipline (don't anchor on the implementer's self-assessment), the disagreement protocol when agents conflict, and the bounded iteration loop. Composes with task-handoff-summaries (handoff package format), structured-code-review (reviewer output format), and any domain-review skill.
